notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan grounds into a double play, pitcher Chris Paddack to shortstop Nicky Lopez to first baseman Jake Burger. Kahlil Watson out at 2nd. Steven Kwan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Steven Kwan rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Steven Kwan grounds into a double play, pitcher Chris Paddack to shortstop Nicky Lopez to first baseman Jake Burger. Kahlil Watson out at 2nd. Steven Kwan out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Guardians challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Daniel Schneemann grounds into a force out, first baseman Jake Burger to shortstop Nicky Lopez. Kahlil Watson out at 2nd. Daniel Schneemann to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Jakob Junis. Brayan Rocchio scores. Chase DeLauter to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo flies out to left fielder Alejandro Osuna.

notableEvents.label: Daniel Schneemann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Daniel Schneemann flies out to left fielder Alejandro Osuna.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue doubles (6) on a line drive to left fielder Steven Kwan. Cam Cauley scores. Evan Carter scores. Fielding error by left fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue doubles (6) on a line drive to left fielder Steven Kwan. Cam Cauley scores. Evan Carter scores. Fielding error by left fielder Steven Kwan.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kahlil Watson reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman Cam Cauley. Rhys Hoskins to 2nd. Rhys Hoskins advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by second baseman Cam Cauley.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue doubles (6) on a line drive to left fielder Steven Kwan. Cam Cauley scores. Evan Carter scores. Fielding error by left fielder Steven Kwan.
